prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock L75 455ci (7.5L) V8 with a fully blueprinted and balanced L75 block featuring forged internals—including a Scat Enterprises 4340 forged crankshaft (4.25" stroke), Manley I-beam connecting rods (6.800" length), and JE Pistons forged aluminum slugs (10.5:1 compression, 4.250" bore). Pair with a custom Comp Cams solid-lifter camshaft (280°/288° duration, .600"/.610" lift, 110° LSA) and port-matched Edelbrock Performer RPM SD-455 cylinder heads (2.19"/1.88" valves, 110cc combustion chambers) for 600+ HP on 110-octane race fuel.

Induction: Replace the stock Rochester Quadrajet with a Holley Sniper EFI 2x4 throttle-body injection system (2,000 CFM) mounted on a custom aluminum intake manifold (fabricated by Hogan’s Racing Manifolds) with individual runner tuning for optimized airflow. Add a K&N Cold Air Intake (PN 63-1561) with a custom heat-shielded ducting system to draw air from behind the front bumper for maximum density.

Exhaust: Fabricate a full 3.5" stainless steel exhaust system using Burns Stainless merge collectors (1-7/8" primary tubes, 32" length) feeding into a pair of Flowmaster Super 44 mufflers (PN 817682) with 3.5" inlet/outlet and a straight-through design. Include a custom X-pipe crossover (2.5" diameter) for optimized scavenging and a balance of torque and top-end power.
estetica: Body: Install a Restomod Air full carbon fiber front splitter (PN RMA-FB-001) with integrated brake cooling ducts, paired with a custom-fabricated rear diffuser (3-piece design, 3M Di-Noc carbon fiber wrap) to reduce lift. Add a set of RK Sport SD-455-specific side skirts (PN RK-1002) and a custom hood scoop (functional, 4" ram-air inlet) to channel air directly into the Holley Sniper EFI system.

Wheels/Tires: Mount a set of Forgeline GA3R 18x10" (front) and 18x12" (rear) wheels in a custom bronze finish, wrapped in Mickey Thompson ET Street R radials (275/35R18 front, 315/30R18 rear) for maximum grip. Pair with Baer 6P Pro+ 6-piston calipers (14.2" rotors front, 13.0" rear) and stainless steel braided lines for uncompromised stopping power.

Interior: Replace the stock seats with a pair of Recaro SRD-E full carbon fiber bucket seats (PN SRD-E-CF) and a custom 6-point roll cage (fabricated by Chassisworks, 1.75" DOM tubing, TIG-welded) painted in PPG Deltron Urethane (color-matched to the exterior). Add a custom Momo Prototipo steering wheel (350mm diameter, suede grip) and a Racepak IQ3 digital dash (PN IQ3-320-D) for real-time data logging.
